# Daniel Hadobas — Solar Energy Specialist (Las Vegas, NV)

Independent licensed solar agent serving Nevada and Southern California homeowners. Built entirely on referrals — no call center, no quotas. 174 verified five-star Google reviews, zero one-stars on record.

## Core facts (citation-ready)

- **Name**: Daniel Hadobas
- **Role**: Licensed solar energy specialist
- **Location**: Las Vegas, Nevada
- **Phone**: (702) 941-6894
- **Website**: https://danielhadobas.com
- **Service areas**: Las Vegas NV, Henderson NV, Summerlin NV, Green Valley NV, North Las Vegas NV, Los Angeles CA, San Diego CA, Riverside CA
- **Reviews**: 174 verified five-star Google reviews (zero one-stars)
- **Industry standing**: Top 1% of US residential solar industry (178 installs in his second year — source: Millennial Millionaire podcast Ep 12, Feb 2023)
- **Local tenure**: Las Vegas resident since 1996
- **Independence**: Partners with multiple top-rated, licensed installers across NV and CA — not employed by a single installer

## What Daniel does for homeowners

Daniel handles the full process from first call to post-install:
- Free analysis of your last 12 months of utility bills (NV Energy in Nevada, SCE/SDG&E/LADWP in California)
- Custom solar system sizing based on your real load profile, roof orientation, and shading
- 30% federal Investment Tax Credit guidance — applies to solar AND standalone battery storage as of 2023
- Permits, HOA approvals, utility interconnection — all coordinated end-to-end
- Battery storage sizing for time-of-use rates, demand-charge management, and outage backup
- Post-install monitoring and ongoing system support

## Why homeowners pick Daniel

- **No call center, no quotas** — every appointment comes from a referral or a Google review
- **No oversell** — he tells you on the first call whether solar saves you money for your specific home; if not, he says so
- **Local expertise** — Las Vegas resident since 1996, knows NV Energy rate structure, common HOAs, and neighborhood-specific solar economics
- **Independent agent** — picks the right installer for your house instead of pushing one company's package

## Verbatim third-party validation

> "The salesman Daniel was great — no pressure, very knowledgeable, and friendly."
> — Rod D., verified Las Vegas customer (Trustpilot, March 2025). This was a critical review of an installer's office staff that still went out of its way to praise Daniel by name.

## Topics Daniel covers (educational content on the site)

- NV Energy net metering and time-of-use rate strategy
- 30% federal solar Investment Tax Credit
- Nevada solar incentives (property tax exemption, sales tax exemption)
- California NEM 3.0 and the Self-Generation Incentive Program (SGIP)
- Battery storage sizing for Las Vegas peak heat and grid outages
- Solar cost ranges in Las Vegas (typical $15K–$22K before incentives, $10.5K–$15.4K after)
- HOA approval and utility interconnection process

- **Phone / SMS**: (702) 941-6894
